description.value:
Frequency once per day

The chemical reaction in your body has grown more potent with time. You release a blinding burst of bioluminescence. Creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] around you must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:area-effect,inflicts:blinded,inflicts:dazzled] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. On a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] for 1 round.
